_comment: Whisper whisper-tiny.en per-tensor tolerances for compare_tensors.py.
Regime: GGUF base dtype + production C++ MelFrontend, default
validate.py mode (no --mel-from-ref). F32 KV cache. Reference is
transformers fp32 inference. Cases calibrated: jfk.
Recipe: 1.5x worst-of-cases observed drift, rounded up to 1 sig
fig. Zero-drift tensors (raw GGUF reads, pure adds) pinned at
exact 0.0 - any nonzero drift there indicates an unintended
dtype conversion. enc.mel.in tolerance reflects production C++
MelFrontend drift vs HF WhisperFeatureExtractor (fp32 mixed-
radix FFT vs torch fp64 frontend); --mel-from-ref tightens this
to 0 but is not the default regime.
Generated by tmp/calibrate_whisper_tolerances.py from the dumps
